mapper.select: SELECT c.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_scs.code_label AS close_status_cd_nm FROM st_settle_close c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_scs ON cd_scs.code_grp = 'SETTLE_CLOSE_STATUS' AND cd_scs.code_value = c.close_status_cd WHERE c.settle_close_id = #{id}
